module.name: ibm-roks-cneinstance
module.description: Deploy the BIG-IP Next CNEInstance custom resource after FLO is ready.

required.reason: CNEInstance requires FLO CRDs, networking, and trusted profile outputs.

required.name: f5_bigip_k8s_manifest_version
required.description: F5 BIG-IP Next for Kubernetes manifest version.

required.name: cluster_issuer_name
required.description: Cluster issuer used by CNEInstance certificates.

required.name: cneinstance_ibm_trusted_profile_id
required.description: IBM trusted profile ID for cloud API access.

required.name: cneinstance_network_attachments
required.description: Network attachment definitions consumed by CNEInstance.

optional.name: flo_namespace
optional.description: Namespace where FLO and the CNEInstance resource are deployed.

optional.name: utils_namespace
optional.description: Namespace for shared F5 utility components.

optional.name: cneinstance_whole_cluster
optional.description: Deploy the CNEInstance across the whole cluster.

optional.name: cneinstance_cloud_provider
optional.description: Cloud provider name used by the module.

optional.name: cneinstance_vpc_name
optional.description: Cluster VPC name used by the CNE cloud environment settings.

optional.name: cneinstance_cloud_region
optional.description: IBM Cloud region used by the CNE cloud environment settings.

optional.name: flo_deployment_id
optional.description: Optional FLO deployment identifier used for wait logic.

optional.name: flo_deployment_dependency
optional.description: Optional explicit FLO dependency object used by the upstream module.

key_outputs.name: deployment_name
key_outputs.description: Deployment identifier exposed by the CNEInstance wrapper.

key_outputs.name: namespace
key_outputs.description: Namespace where the CNEInstance resource is deployed.

key_outputs.name: cneinstance_name
key_outputs.description: Name of the deployed CNEInstance resource.
